title: MythicPrefixes/Tags
description: A tag plugin that has BUFF and actions system!
body:
[![Discord](https://builtbybit.com/attachments/1000056240-png.1340849/?preset=fullr1)](https://discord.gg/RZajEybhBw) [![Website](https://builtbybit.com/attachments/1000056239-png.1340848/?preset=fullr1)](https://mythicprefixes.superiormc.cn/) ![Banner](https://builtbybit.com/attachments/1000056232-png.1340847/?preset=fullr1)
# **MythicPrefixes** *A lightweight, flexible, and highly customizable prefix management framework for modern Minecraft servers.* MythicPrefixes is an **advanced prefix and tag management framework** for Spigot/Paper servers, provides lightweight experience and prefix **BUFF** system as prefix bonus. It is designed for server owners who need more than simple text tags: from clean chat prefixes to **multi-prefix systems, attribute effects, conditional logic, and fully custom action workflows**. Unlike traditional beginner-focused plugins, MythicPrefixes just provide tag manager feature without scoreboard/chat/tab/shop module, which means: * You need extra scoreboard/chat/tab plugin and use placeholders provided by this plugin to display prefix in scoreboard/chat/tab. * You need extra shop and permission plugin and use permission condition to control which prefix player can equip. If you unsure which I mean, you may need choose other plugins like this.
![GUI Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ManyouTeam/MythicPrefixes/refs/heads/master/show/gui.gif)
## **Features** ### **Lightweight-Focused by Design** * Lightweight core architecture suitable for high-version servers * No unnecessary built-in economy/shop/storage systems that create overhead * Uses permission- and condition-driven control for cleaner integration with existing stacks * Great choice for administrators who prefer modular, maintainable infrastructure ### **Truly Flexible Prefix Architecture** * Supports **multiple prefixes equipped at the same time** * Supports create **multi display placeholders** with settings like **max amount, hide lists, and output formats** * Supports **player-driven custom prefix** * Display content can be driven by **permissions, placeholders, conditions, and custom logic** * Display content supports **PlaceholderAPI** integration for dynamic output * Designed for high compatibility with modern formatting pipelines ### **Action & Condition Engine** * Supports execute actions on **equip, unequip, click, and timed repeat** * Built-in action system supports **message, actionbar, title, sound, commands, teleport, particles, and entity spawn** * Condition system supports **permission, world, biome, placeholder checks, ANY mode, and NOT logic** * Chain complex workflows with **conditional execution and chance/delay actions** ### **Buff & Effect Integrations** * Integrates with **libreforge** for custom effect workflows * Supports **AuraSkills**/**MythicMobs** and **MMOLib** attribute/stat as prefix bonus * Auto remove buff / effect when unequip the prefix ### **GUI & Interaction Features** * Includes configurable GUI support for prefix selection flows * Button behavior can be extended through actions and conditions * Premium: Supports auto translate Java inventory to Bedrock Form UI to make bedrock players have better experience ### **Modern Text Features** * Supports **HEX colors and gradient colors** * Supports legacy color codes and MiniMessage-style display workflows * Premium: Per-player language support
